title: Cryo-EM Structural Determination of VPS13C
author: Dazhi Li
materials: Estimate final resolutions using gold-standard FSC at the 0.143 criterion.
Manually curate micrographs and discard poor-quality images.
Pick particles and extract them for downstream analysis.
Generate initial 3D models by ab initio reconstruction.
Refine the selected particles by non-uniform refinement.

steps.title: Clean the EM grid using an...
steps.instruction: Clean the EM grid using an oxygen/argon plasma in a Gatan Solarus Advanced Plasma System. Quantifoil R1.2/1.3 300 mesh gold grids coated with a 2nm continuous carbon film Ted Pella, Inc. Catalog ## 668-300-AU

steps.title: Apply 3
steps.instruction: Apply 3.5 μL concentrated VPS13C sample (~0.04 mg/mL) to the grid and incubate for 30 s.

steps.title: Blot the grid for 1
steps.instruction: Blot the grid for 1.5 s at blot force −12 in a Vitrobot Mark IV at 8 °C and 100% humidity, then plunge-freeze in liquid ethane cooled by liquid nitrogen.

steps.title: Clip and screen the grids, store...
steps.instruction: Clip and screen the grids, store selected grids in liquid nitrogen.

steps.title: Load pre-screened grids into a Titan...
steps.instruction: Load pre-screened grids into a Titan Krios transmission electron microscope operated at 300 kV and equipped with a BioQuantum energy filter and K3 direct electron detector.

steps.title: Acquire data in SerialEM using super-resolution mode at 0
steps.instruction: Acquire data in SerialEM using super-resolution mode at 0.534 Å/pixel with a defocus range of −2.0 to −2.5 μm. Note that the defocus was selected for better particle picking. A lower defocus range might be used.

steps.title: Record each movie for 2
steps.instruction: Record each movie for 2.896 s as 50 dose-fractionated frames, corresponding to a total dose of 42.7 e−/Å².

steps.title: Perform motion correction and CTF estimation in CryoSPARC
steps.instruction: Perform motion correction and CTF estimation in CryoSPARC. CryoSPARC v4.6.2 Structura Biotechnology Inc. The whole data processing workflow (Strep 9- Strep 18) and the statistics of refined maps.

steps.title: Perform iterative 2D classification to remove...
steps.instruction: Perform iterative 2D classification to remove junk particles and select good classes.

steps.title: Collect 4,140 movies at 0° tilt...
steps.instruction: Collect 4,140 movies at 0° tilt and 4,914 movies at 25° tilt. This attenuates the preferred orientation problem of the VPS13C sample.

steps.title: Apply local or focused refinement with...
steps.instruction: Apply local or focused refinement with masks to improve flexible regions.

steps.title: Perform heterogeneous refinement to separate particle...
steps.instruction: Perform heterogeneous refinement to separate particle populations and select the best class.
